author: claude-code-agent

patch.value:
## Summary

A scaffolded package created with `pm package init --capability search` (or a hand-authored extension that combines the `search` capability with its own commands, or a pure `importers` extension) registers a command that cannot be invoked from the CLI. Running the command prints `Error: Unknown command <group>` even though `pm package describe` lists the command handler and `pm package doctor` reports the extension as active.

## Root cause

Bootstrap lazy activation (`pm-5wb6`) defers importing+activating an extension until a probe of the invoked command path indicates the extension contributes to it. When an extension does NOT declare static `activation.commands` in its manifest, the decision falls back to capability heuristics in `extensionNeedsActivationForProbe` (src/cli/main.ts). Two heuristic branches are wrong for command-bearing capabilities:

1. `search`: the branch `if (capabilities.has("search")) return commandPathNeedsSearchExtensions(probe.commandPath)` returns early (terminal), shadowing the later conservative `commands`/`schema`/`services` activation. So a `search`+`commands` extension whose command is not a built-in search word (reindex/search/search-advanced) never activates for its own command.

2. `importers`: the branch `if (capabilities.has("importers")) return probe.allowCommandPrefixMatch === true` only activates on a help prefix, never on direct invocation. `registerImporter`/`registerExporter` register command handlers, so a pure-importers extension's `<name> import` command never dispatches.

The bug is masked whenever another extension with a conservative capability (e.g. `commands`-only) is also installed, because the whole extension set is then activated and the affected extension piggybacks.

## Deterministic repro

```
pm package init ./kanban-board --capability search --project   # command: "kanban board ping", caps [commands, search]
pm package --install ./kanban-board --project
pm kanban board ping     # => Error: Unknown command kanban   (BUG)
```

Pure importers:
```
# extension with capabilities ["importers"] registering importer "tickets"
pm tickets import        # => Error: Unknown command tickets  (BUG)
```

Working cases (for contrast): a `commands`-only scaffold (`pm widget ping`, even 3-level `pm alpha beta ping`) dispatches fine; a `search` scaffold whose first command word IS a search builtin (`search only ping`) dispatches because the search-builtin gate matches.

## Why the scaffold hit this

Every first-party bundled package declares `activation.commands` (pm-beads, pm-todos, pm-search-advanced, ...), so they activate precisely via the exact-match path and never reach the buggy heuristics. The scaffold emitted by `pm package init` / `pm extension --init` was the outlier: it omitted `activation.commands`, pushing generated packages onto the heuristic fallback.

## Fix direction

- Scaffold declares `activation.commands` matching the commands it registers (aligns generated packages with the first-party convention; precise lazy activation).
- Harden the heuristic fallback so command-bearing `search`/`importers` extensions still activate for their own commands when `activation.commands` is absent.

Relates to lazy activation [[pm-5wb6]] and the silently-unavailable-commands theme of [[pm-yffj]]; the importers scaffold shipped in [[pm-j5az]].
Scaffolded search/importers package commands fail to dispatch: lazy-activation probe skips command-bearing extensions that omit activation.commands

pm package init --capability search|importers (and hand-authored search+commands or pure-importers extensions) register commands that error with 'Unknown command' because the bootstrap activation probe's capability heuristics skip activation when activation.commands is not declared.

message: File scaffolded-extension command activation bug found during manual smoke

author: claude-code-agent
message: link bug to lazy-activation feature, related issue, and importers scaffold

patch.value: Fixed by pm-yxb5: root cause was scaffolds omitting manifest activation.commands plus two activation-probe heuristic defects (search early-return shadowing conservative command activation; importers gated to help-prefix only). Scaffold now declares activation.commands and the heuristics treat search/importers as command-bearing.
Scaffolded and hand-authored command-bearing search/importers extensions dispatch their own commands from the CLI.
Reproductions (pm kanban board ping, pm tickets sync items import) now succeed; regression tests added.

Fixed by pm-yxb5: root cause was scaffolds omitting manifest activation.commands plus two activation-probe heuristic defects (search early-return shadowing conservative command activation; importers gated to help-prefix only). Scaffold now declares activation.commands and the heuristics treat search/importers as command-bearing.
